ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "date_block_num" INTEGER /* Date block number for grouping sales data */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the shop where the sale occurred */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the item sold */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the item at the time of sale */,
  "item_cnt_day" INTEGER /* Number of items sold in a day */,
  "item_category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the category of the item */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer who made the purchase */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the promotion applied to the sale */,
  "return_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the sale was returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was returned */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_date_block_num FOREIGN KEY ("date_block_num") REFERENCES date_blocks ("date_block_num"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shops" (
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop */,
  "shop_name" TEXT /* Name of the shop */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the shop */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the shop */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the manager of the shop */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the shop opened */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date when the shop closed (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shops_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the category of the item */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the item */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the brand of the item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the supplier of the item */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the item should be reordered */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the item in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "date_blocks" (
  "date_block_num" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date block */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the date block */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the date block */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the date block */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the date block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_block_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the item */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the shop where the item is stocked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was last reordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price change record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the item */,
  "old_price" REAL /* Old price of the item */,
  "new_price" REAL /* New price of the item */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the price change occurred */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the price change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_changes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales manager, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sale data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "date_block_num" INTEGER /* Date block number for the report */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the shop */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the period */,
  "total_items_sold" INTEGER /* Total number of items sold in the period */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of items sold in the period */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_date_block_num FOREIGN KEY ("date_block_num") REFERENCES date_blocks ("date_block_num")
)
